custom.background: rgb(17, 169, 131) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
custom.fontFamily: "PingFang SC", "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, "Hiragino Sans GB", "Microsoft YaHei"

tw: inline-block relative font-normal leading-relaxed whitespace-nowrap border visible cursor-pointer mt-1 mr-3.5 mb-0 ml-1 pt-0 pr-2 pb-0 pl-2 overflow-visible
